content_body:
Large Group Cabin Rentals

Are you looking for North GA Mountain large luxury lodges and large cabins that can accommodate ~50 guests in beautiful Blue Ridge, GA? Providing thoughtful cabin amenities and beautiful prime locations perfect for corporate retreats, church retreats, or family reunions, Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers luxurious cabins that will be sure to accommodate and delight your special experience. 

North Georgia Cabins for Family Reunions + Corporate Retreats

In an effort to please everyone, planning a large family reunion in Blue Ridge can be daunting, but Cabin Rentals of Georgia can help. Within a day's drive of the eastern half of the United States and only 2 hours north of the Atlanta airport, Blue Ridge is the perfect location for your gathering. Given the variety of things to do in Blue Ridge, GA and the surrounding area, young and old will create memories to last forever. 

Planning business retreats has never been easier than with Cabin Rentals of Georgia. We have had the pleasure of hosting many a successful business retreat over the years in our beautiful locales, which are ideal for team building, exploration, and wellness. 

Large Cabins for Family Reunions

With the ability to house up to ~50 guests, you can be sure that your stay will be full of fun and excitement. The largest grouping of cabins we have are our Toccoa River luxury cabin rentals, which is ideal for guests to enjoy riverfront activities and fire pits. 

While each of our luxury cabins are rented individually, you can chose to rent two or more cabins in close proximity in an effort to share the Blue Ridge experience with other family members, business partners, or groups of friends. 

Toccoa River Cabin Rentals:


Riverview Lodge (top left) & Fallen Timber Lodge (bottom center)

Four luxurious lodges with river access, 650 feet of river frontage with fire pits and picnic tables, and just 9 miles to Downtown Blue Ridge provide the perfect locale for luxury, adventure, and team building. From these luxury properties, you can tube and kayak right from the property for a two-hour float into McCaysville, which is a short 10 minute drive for the pick up. We have partnered with North GA Trout Fishing for amazing guided fly-fishing experiences. 

The following 4 cabins are all close together ~ all homes sleep a total of 43 guests:

  • Fallen Timber Lodge - 5 bedroom/5.5 bath - sleeps 12; located the next driveway over from Riverview Lodge
  • Riverview Lodge - 5 bedroom/5.5 bath - sleeps 11; located the next driveway over from Fallen Timber Lodge
  • The River's Edge - 5 bedroom/3.5 bath - sleeps 10; located ~1/4 mile from Fallen Timber Lodge and Riverview Lodge
  • Chase Mountain Dreams - 4 bedroom/3 bath - sleeps 10; located in between The Rivers Edge and Fallen Timber Lodge/Riverview Lodge

The following cabin is 1.5 miles away:

  • High Hopes - 4 bedroom/4.5 bath - sleeps 8

Side-By-Side Luxury Cabins: Aska Adventure Area

For smaller groups, our side-by-side cabins in the Aska Adventure Area provide the same standard of luxury and closeness in an activity-packed area! Located next to one another, Serendipity and Cherokee Sunrise are two creekfront cabin rentals perfect for an adult getaway or mutliple families spending time together.

  • Serendipity on Noontootla Creek - 5 bedroom/5.5 bath - sleeps 10; all paved roads, located next to Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek
  • Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek - 2 bedroom/2 bath - sleeps 4; located next door to Serendipity on Noontootla Creek.

Aska Adventure Area Activities

Along Aska Road you will find hiking trails and tube and kayak outfitters for the Toccoa River that runs along Aska Road. The Lilly Pad Village offers family fun including fishing in a large pond, putt-putt in the woods, gem mining, and a gift shop. No matter the age group of your party, there is something for everyone in the North Georgia Mountains.

North Georgia Trout Fishing

For the fishermen in your group, North GA Trout Fishing will provide the most exhilarating time on the Toccoa River landing huge trophy rainbow trout and brown trout. Even more special is their access to our 1/2 mile of Noontootla Creek from Serendipity on Noontootla Creek and Cherokee Sunrise. Monster rainbow trout and huge brownies are lurking in the deep pools of this famed trout stream, and North GA Trout Fishing will guide you to the time of your life.

Additional Cabins Along Aska Road 

In need of additional lodging? Our luxury cabins along Aska Road are within 5-15 minutes of each other and perfect for families that want their own space while experiencing the area together. 

Blue Ridge Lake Sanctuary - 3 bedroom/3.5 bath - sleeps 6

Above the Timberline - 4 bedroom/3.5 bath - sleeps 8

Aska Escape Lodge - 3 bedroom/3 bath - sleeps 6
title: Large Groups & Family Reunions
